creator: jlmales@gmail.com
text: Some examples of additional bugs now occurring is random when XFCE "Suspend" "Shutdown", "Restart" become greyed out.  VTTY switching will stop working at random times or take several minutes to effect with no sense of additional CPU loading as factor resulting in blank screens.  This is just the tip of the bugs and random nature of when bugs will occur.  Another factor in the cause and effect of this is how many web pages are loaded active in web browser, and how many times switch to VTTY and how many times have to repeat key sequence for a specific VTTY.
